11: // Xilinx Peripehrals
12: module ariane_peripherals #(
13:     parameter int AxiAddrWidth = -1,
14:     parameter int AxiDataWidth = -1,
15:     parameter int AxiIdWidth   = -1,
16:     parameter int AxiUserWidth = 1,
17:     parameter bit InclUART     = 1,
18:     parameter bit InclSPI      = 0,
19:     parameter bit InclEthernet = 0,
20:     parameter bit InclGPIO     = 0
21: ) (
22:     input  logic               clk_i           , // Clock
23:     input  logic               rst_ni          , // Asynchronous reset active low
24:     AXI_BUS.in                 plic            ,
25:     AXI_BUS.in                 aes             , 
26:     AXI_BUS.in                 rom2_fuse       ,
27:     AXI_BUS.in                 pkt             ,
28:     AXI_BUS.in                 uart            ,
29:     AXI_BUS.in                 spi             ,
30:     AXI_BUS.in                 ethernet        ,
31:     output logic [31:0]        jtag_key        , 
32:     output logic [1:0][47:0]   access_ctrl_reg , 
33:     output logic [1:0]         irq_o           ,
34:     // UART
35:     input  logic               rx_i            ,
36:     output logic               tx_o            ,
37:     // Ethernet
38:     input  wire                eth_txck        ,
39:     input  wire                eth_rxck        ,
40:     input  wire                eth_rxctl       ,
41:     input  wire [3:0]          eth_rxd         ,
42:     output wire                eth_rst_n       ,
43:     output wire                eth_tx_en       ,
44:     output wire [3:0]          eth_txd         ,
45:     inout  wire                phy_mdio        ,
46:     output logic               eth_mdc         ,
47:     // MDIO Interface
48:     inout                      mdio            ,
49:     output                     mdc             ,
50:     // SPI
51:     output logic               spi_clk_o       ,
52:     output logic               spi_mosi        ,
53:     input  logic               spi_miso        ,
54:     output logic               spi_ss
55: );
56: 
57:     // ---------------
58:     // 1. PLIC
59:     // ---------------
60:     logic [ariane_soc::NumSources-1:0] irq_sources;
61: 
62:     REG_BUS #(
63:         .ADDR_WIDTH ( 32 ),
64:         .DATA_WIDTH ( 32 )
65:     ) reg_bus (clk_i);
66: 
67:     logic         plic_penable;
68:     logic         plic_pwrite;
69:     logic [31:0]  plic_paddr;
70:     logic         plic_psel;
71:     logic [31:0]  plic_pwdata;
72:     logic [31:0]  plic_prdata;
73:     logic         plic_pready;
74:     logic         plic_pslverr;
75: 
76:     axi2apb_64_32 #(
77:         .AXI4_ADDRESS_WIDTH ( AxiAddrWidth  ),
78:         .AXI4_RDATA_WIDTH   ( AxiDataWidth  ),
79:         .AXI4_WDATA_WIDTH   ( AxiDataWidth  ),
80:         .AXI4_ID_WIDTH      ( AxiIdWidth    ),
81:         .AXI4_USER_WIDTH    ( AxiUserWidth  ),
82:         .BUFF_DEPTH_SLAVE   ( 2             ),
83:         .APB_ADDR_WIDTH     ( 32            )
84:     ) i_axi2apb_64_32_plic (
85:         .ACLK      ( clk_i          ),
86:         .ARESETn   ( rst_ni         ),
87:         .test_en_i ( 1'b0           ),
88:         .AWID_i    ( plic.aw_id 
[TRUNCATED]

1:  /*
2:  * ROM2: Which have all the keys.
3:  */
4: 
5: module rom2 (
6:    input  logic         clk_i,
7:    input  logic         rst_ni,
8:    input  logic         req_i,
9:    input  logic         we_i,
10:    input  logic [63:0]  addr_i,
11:    input  logic [63:0]  wdata_i,
12:    output logic [63:0]  rdata_o,
13:    output logic [3:0][191:0]  secure_reg // Ideally [1:0] should be [RomSize-1:0]. In this case RomSize is 2.
14: );
15:     localparam int RomSize = 4;
16: 
17: // Store key values here. // Replication of fuse. 
18:     const logic [RomSize-1:0][191:0] mem = {
19:         192'h00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000_0000f8f8_ff6fe00f, // 3rd location for Access control master 1. First 4 bits for peripheral 0, next 4 for p1 and so on.
20:         192'h00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000_0000fff8_ff6ff00f, // 2nd location for Access control master 0. First 4 bits for peripheral 0, next 4 for p1 and so on.
21:         192'h2b7e1516_28aed2a6_abf71588_09cf4f3c_2b7e1516_28aed2a6, // 1st location for JTAG
22:         192'h55555555_28aed2a6_abf71588_09cf4f3c_2b7e1516_28aed2a6  // oth location for AES
23:     };
24: 
25: // Secure registers. Key values copied from fuse to these registers on reset.
26: //    logic [RomSize-1:0][191:0] secure_reg;
27: 
28:     logic [$clog2(RomSize)-1:0] raddr_q;
29: 
30: // We can read and write initial 64 bits.
31: // On reset, key values will be copied to registers.
32:     always_ff @ (posedge clk_i) begin
33:         if (~rst_ni) begin
34:             secure_reg <= mem;
35:         end else begin
36:         if(req_i) begin
37:             if (!we_i) begin
38:                 raddr_q <= addr_i[$clog2(RomSize)-1+3:3];
39:             end else begin
40:                 secure_reg[addr_i[$clog2(RomSize)-1+3:3]] <= wdata_i;
41:             end
42:         end
43:         end
44:     end
45:     // this prevents spurious Xes from propagating into
46:     // the speculative fetch stage of the core
47:     assign rdata_o = (raddr_q < RomSize) ? secure_reg[raddr_q] : '0;
48: 
49: 
50: endmodule

{"tool": "read_file", "status": "ok", "content": "170: ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
171:     // ---------------
172:     // ROM2_FUSE peripheral
173:     // It has all the keys in fuse registers.
174:     // ---------------
175:     //logic [63:0]                  rom2_addr;
176:     //logic [64-1:0]                rom2_rdata;
177:     logic                         rom2_req;
178:     logic [AxiAddrWidth-1:0]      rom2_addr;
179:     logic                         rom2_we;
180:     logic [31:0]                  pkey_loc_o;
181:     logic [3:0][191:0]            key_reg_out;
182:     logic [AxiDataWidth-1:0]    rom2_rdata;
183:     logic [AxiDataWidth-1:0]    rom2_wdata;
184: 
185:  
186:     axi2mem #(
187:         .AXI_ID_WIDTH   ( AxiIdWidth          ),
188:         .AXI_ADDR_WIDTH ( AxiAddrWidth        ),
189:         .AXI_DATA_WIDTH ( AxiDataWidth        ),
190:         .AXI_USER_WIDTH ( AxiUserWidth        )
191:     ) i_axi2rom2 (
192:         .clk_i  ( clk_i                    ),
193:         .rst_ni ( rst_ni                   ),
194:         .slave  ( rom2_fuse                ),
195:         .req_o  ( rom2_req                 ),
196:         .we_o   ( rom2_we                  ),
197:         .addr_o ( rom2_addr                ),
198:         .be_o   (                          ),
199:         .data_o ( rom2_wdata               ),
200:         .data_i ( rom2_rdata               )
201:     );
202: 
203: 
204:     rom2 i_rom2 (
205:         .clk_i      ( clk_i      ),
206:         .rst_ni     ( rst_ni     ),
207:         .req_i      ( rom2_req   ),
208:         .we_i       ( rom2_we    ),
209:         .addr_i     ( rom2_addr  ),
210:         .wdata_i    ( rom2_wdata ),
211:         .rdata_o    ( rom2_rdata ), // this will go to peripheral
212:         .secure_reg ( key_reg_out)
213:     );
214:     
215:     assign jtag_key = key_reg_out[1][31:0];
216:     assign access_ctrl_reg[0] = key_reg_out[2][47:0];
217:     assign access_ctrl_reg[1] = key_reg_out[3][47:0];

261:         .AWREGION_i( pkt.aw_region ),
262:         .AWUSER_i  ( pkt.aw_user   ),
263:         .AWQOS_i   ( pkt.aw_qos    ),
264:         .AWVALID_i ( pkt.aw_valid  ),
265:         .AWREADY_o ( pkt.aw_rea
[TRUNCATED]

183:     ariane_axi::resp_t   dm_axi_m_resp, dm_axi_s_resp;
184: 
185:     // debug module
186:     dm_top #(
187:         // current implementation only supports 1 hart
188:         .NrHarts              ( 1                         ),
189:         .AxiIdWidth           ( AXI_ID_WIDTH_SLAVES       ),

191:         .AxiDataWidth         ( AXI_DATA_WIDTH            ),
192:         .AxiUserWidth         ( AXI_USER_WIDTH            )
193:     ) i_dm_top (
194: 
195:         .clk_i                ( clk_i                ),
196:         .rst_ni               ( rst_ni               ), // PoR
197:         .testmode_i           ( test_en              ),
198:         .ndmreset_o           ( ndmreset             ),
199:         .dmactive_o           (                      ), // active debug session
200:         .debug_req_o          ( debug_req_core       ),
201:         .unavailable_i        ( '0                   ),
202:         .axi_s_req_i          ( dm_axi_s_req         ),
203:         .axi_s_resp_o         ( dm_axi_s_resp        ),
204:         .axi_m_req_o          ( dm_axi_m_req         ),
205:         .axi_m_resp_i         ( dm_axi_m_resp        ),
206:         .dmi_rst_ni           ( rst_ni               ),

208:         .dmi_req_ready_o      ( debug_req_ready      ),
209:         .dmi_req_i            ( debug_req            ),
210:         .dmi_resp_valid_o     ( debug_resp_valid     ),
211:         .dmi_resp_ready_i     ( debug_resp_ready     ),
212:         .dmi_resp_o           ( debug_resp           )
213:     );
214: 
215:     axi_master_connect i_axi_master_dm (.axi_req_i(dm_axi_m_req), .axi_resp_o(dm_axi_m_resp), .master(slave[1]));
216:     axi_slave_connect  i_axi_slave_dm  (.axi_req_o(dm_axi_s_req), .axi_resp_i(dm_axi_s_resp), .slave(master[ariane_soc::Debug]));
217:

229:         .AXI_ID_WIDTH   ( AXI_ID_WIDTH_SLAVES ),
230:         .AXI_ADDR_WIDTH ( AXI_ADDRESS_WIDTH   ),
231:         .AXI_DATA_WIDTH ( AXI_DATA_WIDTH      ),
232:         .AXI_USER_WIDTH ( AXI_USER_WIDTH      )
233:     ) i_axi2rom (
234:         .clk_i  ( clk_i                   ),
235:         .rst_ni ( ndmreset_n              ),
236:         .slave  ( master[ariane_soc::ROM] ),
237:         .req_o  ( rom_req                 ),
238:         .we_o   ( rom_we                  ),
239:         .addr_o ( rom_addr                ),
240:         .be_o   (                         ),
241:         .data_o ( rom_wdata               ),
242:         .data_i ( rom_rdata               )
243:     );
244: 
245:     bootrom i_bootrom (
246:         .clk_i      ( clk_i     ),
247:         .req_i      ( rom_req   ),
248:         .we_i       ( rom_we    ),
249:         .addr_i     ( rom_addr  ),
250:         .wdata_i    ( rom_wdata ),
251:         .rdata_o    ( rom_rdata )
252:     );

260:         .AXI_DATA_WIDTH ( AXI_DATA_WIDTH      ),
261:         .AXI_ID_WIDTH   ( AXI_ID_WIDTH_SLAVES ),
262:         .AXI_USER_WIDTH ( AXI_USER_WIDTH      )
263:     ) dram();

268:     logic [AXI_DATA_WIDTH/8-1:0]  be;
269:     logic [AXI_DATA_WIDTH-1:0]    wdata;

{"tool": "read_file", "status": "ok", "content": "420: 
421:     sram #(
422:         .DATA_WIDTH ( AXI_DATA_WIDTH ),
423:         .NUM_WORDS  ( NUM_WORDS      )
424:     ) i_sram (
425:         .clk_i      ( clk_i                                                                       ),
426:         .rst_ni     ( rst_ni                                                                      ),
427:         .req_i      ( req                                                                         ),
428:         .we_i       ( we                                                                          ),
429:         .addr_i     ( addr[$clog2(NUM_WORDS)-1+$clog2(AXI_DATA_WIDTH/8):$clog2(AXI_DATA_WIDTH/8)] ),
430:         .wdata_i    ( wdata                                                                       ),
431:         .be_i       ( be                                                                          ),
432:         .rdata_o    ( rdata                                                                       )
433:     );
434: 
435:     // ---------------
436:     // AXI Xbar
437:     // ---------------
438: 
439:     riscv::priv_lvl_t           priv_lvl_processor;   
440:     logic [riscv::PRIV_LVL_WIDTH-1:0] priv_lvl ; 
441:     assign priv_lvl = priv_lvl_processor ; 
442:     logic [NB_SUBORDINATE-1:0][ariane_soc::NB_PERIPHERALS-1:0][riscv::NB_PRIV_LVL-1:0] access_ctrl ;   
443:     
444:     // Getting configuration registers form FUSE memory. 
445:     genvar i,j;
446: 
447:     generate
448:         for (i=0; i<NB_SUBORDINATE; i++) begin
449:             for (j=0; j<ariane_soc::NB_PERIPHERALS; j++) begin
450:                 assign access_ctrl[i][j] = access_ctrl_reg[i][4*j +: 4];
451:             end
452:         end
453:     endgenerate
454:     axi_node_intf_wrap #(
455:         .NB_SUBORDINATE           ( NB_SUBORDINATE                   ),
456:         .NB_MANAGER          ( ariane_soc::NB_PERIPHERALS ),
457: 	.NB_PRIV_LVL	    ( riscv::NB_PRIV_LVL	 ), 
458: 	.PRIV_LVL_WIDTH	    ( riscv::PRIV_LVL_WIDTH	 ),
459:         .AXI_ADDR_WIDTH     ( AXI_ADDRESS_WIDTH          ),
460:         .AXI_DATA_WIDTH     ( AXI_DATA_WIDTH             ),
461:         .AXI_USER_WIDTH     ( AXI_USER_WIDTH             ),
462:         .AXI_ID_WIDTH       ( AXI_ID_WIDTH               )
463:         // .MASTER_SLICE_DEPTH ( 0                          ),
464:         // .SLAVE_SLICE_DEPTH  ( 0                          )
465:     ) i_axi_xbar (
466:         .clk          ( clk_i      ),
467:         .rst_n        ( ndmreset_n ),
468:         .test_en_i    ( test_en    ),
469:         .slave        ( slave      ),
470:         .master       ( master     ),
471: 	.priv_lvl_i   ( priv_lvl   ),   
472: 	.access_ctrl_i( access_ctrl),  
473:         .start_addr_i ({
474:             ariane_soc::DebugBase,
475:             ariane_soc::ROMBase,
476:             ariane_soc::ROM2Base,
477:             ariane_soc::PKTBase,
478:             ariane_soc::CLINTBase,
479:             ariane_soc::PLICBase,
480:             ariane_soc::UARTBase,
481:             ariane_soc::AESBase,
482:             ariane_soc::SPIBase,
483:             ariane_soc::EthernetBase,
484:             ariane_soc::GPIOBase,
485:             ariane_soc::DRAMBase
486:         }),
487:         .end_addr_i   ({
488:             ariane_soc::DebugBase    + ariane_soc::DebugLength - 1,
489:             ariane_soc::ROMBase      + ariane_soc::ROMLength - 1,
490:             ariane_soc::ROM2Base     + ariane_soc::ROM2Length - 1,
491:             ariane_soc::PKTBase      + ariane_soc::PKTLength - 1,

409: module connectivity_mapping #(
410:     parameter NB_MANAGER      = 4,
411:     parameter NB_SUBORDINATE       = 4,
412:     parameter NB_PRIV_LVL    = 4,   
413:     parameter PRIV_LVL_WIDTH = 4   
414:   )(
415:     input logic [PRIV_LVL_WIDTH-1:0] 	       priv_lvl_i,   
416:     input logic [NB_SUBORDINATE-1:0][NB_MANAGER-1:0][NB_PRIV_LVL-1:0] access_ctrl_i,  
417:     
418:     output logic [NB_SUBORDINATE-1:0][NB_MANAGER-1:0]  connectivity_map_o
419:   ); 
420: 
421:     
422:   genvar i,j ; 
423: 
424:   generate
425:     
426:     for (i=0; i<NB_SUBORDINATE; i++)
427:     begin
428:       	for (j=0; j<NB_MANAGER; j++)
429:       	begin
430: 	  assign connectivity_map_o[i][j] = access_ctrl_i[i][j][priv_lvl_i] || ((j==6) && access_ctrl_i[i][7][priv_lvl_i]) ; 
431:       	end  		    		      		
432:     end
433: 
434:   endgenerate 
435: 
436: endmodule

260:       assign                        slave[j].r_user                      = s_slave_r_user[j];
